title: paspalum cardenasianum
intro: Paspalum cardenasianum, also known as Cardenas' paspalum or paspalum, is a type of grass native to South America, belonging to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Paspalum cardenasianum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Paspalum cardenasianum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and made into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
